3023cdd3b6a9.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
3023cdd3b6a9.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
3023cdd3b6a9.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

25293b05970b.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
25293b05970b.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

c877e5205819.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
c877e5205819.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
c877e5205819.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

18410602e62d.title: Ranked #3 of 3 locally — peers are ahead
18410602e62d.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

a483281d9fc8.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
a483281d9fc8.description: You trail peers by 1.4 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

f2e5087a4d0f.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
f2e5087a4d0f.description: At 73 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
